nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 栗臀噪鹛
nodes.summary: 栗臀噪鹛（Pterorhinus gularis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如栗臀噪鹛。

nodes.name: Pterorhinus
nodes.summary: Pterorhinus（Pterorhinus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联23种鸟类，如灰胸噪鹛、白脸噪鹛、黄喉噪鹛等23种鸟类。

nodes.name: 脊索动物门
nodes.summary: 脊索动物门（Chordata）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 栗臀噪鹛
nodes.summary: The rufous-vented laughingthrush (Pterorhinus gularis) is a species of bird in the family Leiothrichidae. It is found in Bangladesh, Bhutan, India, Laos, Myanmar, and Vietnam. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical moist montane forest. This species was formerly placed in the genus Garrulax but following the publication of a comprehensive molecular phylogenetic study in 2018, it was moved to the resurrected genus Pterorhinus. References
